zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes von Braunschweig於1201年出生在瑞士阿高海音費爾登時，她的父親Heinrich  V von Braunschweig29歲，母親Agnes von Hohenstaufen25歲。她於1222年5月與Otto II von Bayern在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1267年11月16日在德國貝也明陳享年66歲，埋葬在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 普法分霍分 安 德 易爾姆也。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes von Braunschweig于1201年出生在瑞士阿高海音費爾登时，她的父亲Heinrich  V von Braunschweig29岁，母亲Agnes von Hohenstaufen25岁。她于1222年5月与Otto II von Bayern在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1267年11月16日在德国貝也明陳享年66岁，埋葬在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 普法分霍分 安 德 易爾姆也。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Braunschweig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Heinz, Juergen, Kurt, Otto, Reinhold.

German and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): habitational name from the city of Braunschweig in Lower Saxony, known in English as Brunswick. The placename is from the genitive case of the ancient Germanic personal name Bruno (borne by the Duke of Saxony who founded the city in 861) + Old Saxon wīk ‘dwelling place’, ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes von Braunschweig was born in 1201, in Rheinfelden, Aargau, Switzerland, her father, Heinrich  V von Braunschweig, was 29 and her mother, Agnes von Hohenstaufen, was 25. She married Otto II von Bayern in May 1222, in Holy Roman Empire. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 16 November 1267, in Munich, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 66, and was buried in Scheyern, Pfaffenhofen, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes von Braunschweig est née en 1201, à Rheinfelden, Argovie, Suisse, son père, Heinrich  V von Braunschweig, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Agnes von Hohenstaufen, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Otto II von Bayern en mai 1222, à Saint-Empire romain. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 novembre 1267, à München, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Scheyern, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes von Braunschweig 1201 in Rheinfelden, Aargau, Schweiz geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Heinrich  V von Braunschweig 29 und ihre Mutter Agnes von Hohenstaufen 25. Sie hat im Mai 1222 in Heiliges Römisches Reich Otto II von Bayern geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. November 1267 im Alter von 66 Jahren in München, Bayern, Deutschland und wurde in Scheyern, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes von Braunschweig è nata il nel 1201 nel Rheinfelden, Argovia, Svizzera, sua padre, Heinrich  V von Braunschweig, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Agnes von Hohenstaufen, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Otto II von Bayern nel maggio 1222, nel Heiliges Römisches Reich. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 16 novembre 1267, nel München, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Scheyern, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes von Braunschweigが1201年にスイスアールガウルヘインフエルデンで生まれた時，父Heinrich  V von Braunschweigは29歳，母Agnes von Hohenstaufenは25歳であった。1222年5月にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチでOtto II von Bayernと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1267年11月16日にドイツバイエルンムuンチェンで66歳で死去し，ドイツバイエルンランドクレイス プファフエンhオフン アン ダー イルムシェイエルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes von Braunschweig(이)가 1201년 스위스 아아르가 리인펠든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Heinrich  V von Braunschweig(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes von Hohenstaufen(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1222년 5월 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치에서 Otto II von Bayern(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1267년 11월 16일 독일 베이른 u천에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 파아펜호펜 앤 데르 이름 슈예른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes von Braunschweig nasceu em 1201, em Rheinfelden, Aargau, Suiça, seu pai, Heinrich  V von Braunschweig, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Agnes von Hohenstaufen, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Otto II von Bayern em maio de 1222, em Heiliges Römisches Reich. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de novembro de 1267, em München, Bayern, Alemanha, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Scheyern, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.Scheyern, Pfaffenhofen, Bavaria, Germany: щиирн, ландкрис пфаффенофен ан дир илм, беиирн, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes von Braunschweig родилась в 1201 г. в местности раинфелден, ааргау, Швейцария, её отцу по имени Heinrich  V von Braunschweig было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes von Hohenstaufen, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Otto II von Bayern май 1222 г. в местности хилигесь рoмищесь раич. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 16 ноября 1267 г. в местности мuнчэн, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности щиирн, ландкрис пфаффенофен ан дир илм, беиирн, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes von Braunschweig nació en 1201, en Rheinfelden, Aargau, Suiza, su papá, Heinrich  V von Braunschweig, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Agnes von Hohenstaufen, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Otto II von Bayern en mayo de 1222, en Heiliges Römisches Reich. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 16 de noviembre de 1267, en München, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Scheyern, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Alemania.
